channel.title: [BLOG] betelgeuse-7 | Abidin Durdu
channel.description: Recent content on [BLOG] betelgeuse-7 | Abidin Durdu

item.title: Hello World
item.description: First blog post. package main import "fmt" func main() { fmt.Println("Hello world") }

item.title: About Me
item.description: I am a software developer living in Turkey. I enjoy programming. I started programming in September 2020, when I was bored in quarantine. I build open-source projects on Github. I also use Twitter. I do have a LinkedIn profile. I mainly use Go. I like it. I am trying to get into software development industry, as a Go back-end developer. I follow this roadmap. I am also interested in programming languages, and building compilers.
